instructions.original_snippets: Phase 1 entry gate: AskUserQuestion must confirm user approval before Phase 2 executes. NEVER bypass this gate.
NEVER run a probe with production traffic — probes are designed to fail safely; production failures are not safe.
NEVER treat probe results as proof — Complex domains resist confirmation; one successful probe is a weak signal.
NEVER design an irreversible probe — reversibility is the core property that makes probing safe.
Persist thinking artifact to thinking/probes/{project}/{date}-{slug}-llm.md before exit gate. MANDATORY — do not skip.
Classify result as confirmed, refuted, partial, or surprise before selecting handoff template.
If AskUserQuestion returns empty, do NOT proceed with assumptions — present options as a numbered list and wait.
